examples.eng: His hands shook with excitement.
Her eyes sparkled with excitement.
Their excitement was intense.
The excitement toned down.
A voice vibratory with excitement.
The child cried out in excitement.
The puppy wiggled with excitement.
In my excitement, I forgot all about the message.
examples.ru: Я так разволновалась, что совсем забыла о послании /сообщении/.

examples.eng: She felt a stab of excitement.
I felt a rush of excitement when she arrived.
examples.ru: Когда она приехала, меня вдруг охватило волнение.

examples.eng: The crowd was going wild with excitement.
A feeling of excitement ran through her body as they touched.
examples.ru: Волна возбуждения пробежала по её телу, когда они соприкоснулись.

examples.eng: Excitement stirred inside her.
The show brims with excitement.
His face was ablaze with excitement.
His excitement was such that he shouted.
examples.ru: Он так разволновался, что перешёл на крик.

examples.eng: There was a sense of excitement in the air.
His excitement soon boiled away when the work actually started.
examples.ru: Его энтузиазм иссяк, когда началась настоящая работа.

examples.eng: The book sizzles with excitement.
The crowd screamed with excitement.
Jessica's eyes sparkled with excitement.
full of happiness and pleasurable excitement
At last all the excitement had settled down.
It was the most sudden and violent excitement which ever conflagrated a nation.
examples.ru: Это было самое внезапное и неистовое волнение, которое когда-либо охватывало народ.

examples.eng: Sheila felt giddy with excitement.
examples.ru: От волнения у Шейлы закружилась голова.

examples.eng: Her face was alive with excitement.
His face all ablaze with excitement.
examples.ru: Всё его лицо пылало от возбуждения.

examples.eng: The music is charged with excitement.
Jed's face was alight with excitement.
His head was whirling with excitement.
examples.ru: От волнения у него кружилась голова.
